gaps.description: src/index.js — package.json 'main' entry point exists and exports core API (startServer, createApp, stopServer, detect, getProfile, matchProfile, ensureOllama, chat, stt, tts, embed)
Docker port consistency — Dockerfile EXPOSE 1234, docker-compose.yml maps 1234:1234, healthcheck targets localhost:1234
Cloud fallback — timeout 5s (FIRST_TOKEN_TIMEOUT_MS), consecutive 3 errors (MAX_ERRORS), 60s probe restore (PROBE_INTERVAL_MS) in server/brain.js
ARCHITECTURE.md — cleaned up, no stale CR content, directory tree updated with all source files
ARCHITECTURE.md — store module, runtime adapters, profiler/latency-log, utility modules all formally documented (M99 criteria satisfied)
Import maps removed — no dead #agentic-embed or #agentic-voice in package.json
Test pass rate — 174 test files, 992 tests, 981 passing, 0 failures, 11 skipped
ARCHITECTURE.md install section — correctly documents port 1234 for Docker
Docker deployment — OLLAMA_HOST env var and ./data volume mount present in docker-compose.yml
VISION.md directory tree still references phantom files (detector/optimizer.js, runtime/llm.js) — missing engine/ directory, store/, cli/, and many actual src/ files
gaps.detail: VISION.md tree is substantially out of sync with actual codebase. ARCHITECTURE.md documents the divergence. Cosmetic doc alignment issue.

gaps.description: src/runtime/adapters/embed.js is a stub that throws 'not implemented' — dead code
gaps.detail: Dead code but harmless. Actual embed path works correctly via runtime/embed.js → agentic-embed.

gaps.description: Server middleware (src/server/middleware.js) is a 4-line error handler — no request validation, rate limiting, or security middleware
gaps.detail: Acceptable for local-first architecture. Production deployment would need enhancement.
